lines.speaker: Dr Ford
lines.text: Hello. What brings you to my surgery today?

lines.speaker: Dr Ford
lines.text: Okay, this will hurt you more than it will me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you do before you worked here?

lines.speaker: Dr Ford
lines.text: Oh, I used to be a travelling surgeon. Whenever I saw someone have an accident, I'd be there to check for concussion and offer treatment.

lines.speaker: Dr Ford
lines.text: It was a worthy cause, but I didn't feel properly appreciated, so I retired. Then I got bored, so I came to work here.

lines.speaker: Dr Ford
lines.text: So can I help you with something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you out here on your own?

lines.speaker: Dr Ford
lines.text: I was drawn here... I use to be a traveling doctor, until I arrived in Al Kharid.

lines.speaker: Dr Ford
lines.text: Then I heard it call to me... I immediately gave up my profession and set up here.

lines.speaker: Dr Ford
lines.text: I'm happy here... the voices tell me I'm happy here. I can continue my work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhh... what voices? There is no one else here.

lines.speaker: Dr Ford
lines.text: Of course there isn't, the hole you idiot, the hole speaks to me and I listen... It says I will do great things, only if I listen...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well... alright then, I think I'm just going to go and leave then.
